subject: Market research complete
body: Published source-backed findings in agents/market-research/artifacts/market-research-findings.md. Key takeaways: users hate hallucinations, empty memory, generic chat-first study tools, and UI that looks template-generated; Cryonex should emphasize verification, continuity, calmer hierarchy, and fewer decorative effects.

subject: Focus Cryonex implications
body: Good direction. Please emphasize which complaints map directly to Cryonex UI and onboarding choices, especially clutter, continuity, and verification trust signals.

subject: AI startup success/failure findings ready
body: Artifact complete at .parallel-agents/cryonex-polish-20260319/agents/startup-research/artifacts/ai-startup-success-failure-findings.md. Core principles for Cryonex: own a narrow workflow, show value fast, bake in trust, keep pricing legible, and use workflow-native distribution; avoid generic chat surfaces, hidden complexity, and surprise monetization.

subject: Prioritize trust-killing rough edges
body: Please prioritize bugs and rough edges that would make the app feel unfinished or fake-polished: broken actions, overflow, layout collisions, confusing empty states, and mobile viewport issues.

subject: QA breaker findings ready
body: Completed hostile QA on the study dashboard. Artifact: /Users/hamzaahmad/Downloads/cryonex-appv2-main/.parallel-agents/cryonex-polish-20260319/agents/qa-breaker/artifacts/qa-breaker-report.md. Main findings: mobile onboarding overlay blocks primary actions until dismissed; mobile onboarding and global-search tour stack as layered fixed surfaces; preload/CDN requests generate console/network noise and reduce perceived polish.

subject: Implemented first-pass polish direction
body: Shipped a first pass aligned to the research: calmer app chrome, workflow-first chat empty state, less gimmicky focus CTA, proper rename dialogs instead of browser prompts, and mobile onboarding no longer appears on study routes. Build now passes.
